approved_command_preview:
$downloads = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR','Machine')
$outDir = Join-Path $downloads 'wbs02_review_order_20260505'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $outDir | Out-Null
$order = @(
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=1; table='Governance Control Plane'; rationale='Startup and authority root' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=2; table='Queue Control'; rationale='Live branch authority' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=3; table='Plans'; rationale='Parent plan and active task authority' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=4; table='Work Items'; rationale='Executable work queue authority' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=5; table='Session Checkpoints'; rationale='Resume continuity authority' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=6; table='Delete Queue'; rationale='Deletion governance surface' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=7; table='Validation Evidence'; rationale='Evidence surface for readback and verification' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=8; table='Validation Test Cases'; rationale='Reusable validation catalog' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=9; table='DCOIR Lifecycle Ledger'; rationale='Lifecycle history surface' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=10; table='Admin Registry'; rationale='Administrative registry and skill-state evidence' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=11; table='Repo Surface Registry'; rationale='Repo/source role governance' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=12; table='Operator Preferences'; rationale='Durable operator workflow rules' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=13; table='Local Configuration Registry'; rationale='Safe runtime/config-name registry' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=14; table='Operator Tools Registry'; rationale='Reusable operator tool discovery' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=15; table='dcoir-memory-preflight'; rationale='Helper routing memory' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=16; table='dcoir-decision-policy'; rationale='Decision helper memory' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=17; table='dcoir-validation-orchestrator'; rationale='Validation helper memory' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=18; table='Idea Inbox'; rationale='Intake/promotion candidate surface' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=19; table='Gemini Research Reference'; rationale='Reference evidence surface' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=20; table='DCOIR Cleanup WBS'; rationale='Cleanup scaffold; review after authority tables' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=21; table='DCOIR Cleanup Scaffold Registry'; rationale='Cleanup scaffold tracking and final disposition' }
)
$order | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'table_review_order.json') -Encoding UTF8
$md = @('# WBS02 table review order','','Generated by chatgpt-exec. This is a methodology artifact only.','','| rank | table | rationale |','|---:|---|---|') + ($order | ForEach-Object { '| ' + $_.rank + ' | ' + $_.table + ' | ' + $_.rationale + ' |' })
$md | Set-Content -LiteralPath (Join-Path $outDir 'table_review_order.md') -Encoding UTF8
Write-Output ('Generated WBS02 review order at ' + $outDir)
command:

$order = @(

  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=2; table='Queue Control'; rationale='Live branch authority' },
  [pscustomobject]@{ rank=3; table='Plans'; rationale='Parent plan and active task authority' },
